coupon.source_phrase_block: A pass provides 50% off the admission fee. Each of the (4) cards may be used for up to 2 adults and/or children. Children 17 and under are free. Pass card holders may enjoy use of the Museum's Library as a resource free of charge. Passes are not valid for any other applicable discounts on special programming or lectures. Passes are NOT accepted during Flora in Winter of other special events.
